caption: Two men are seated in a room, appearing to react to a video. The man on the left has grey hair and wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right has reddish-brown hair and wears a grey t-shirt with a necklace. He rests his chin on his hand, looking toward the center. Behind them is a television displaying the glowing orange text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" and a soundbar sitting beneath the screen. A shelf containing numerous CDs or DVDs is visible between the two men. An inset video screen shows a dark interior scene with several figures and subtitles that read, "We need to end this war with Shahban Khan." Throughout the sequence, the men remain relatively still in their positions, though the man on the right slightly shifts his gaze and head angle as he observes the content.
